title: discocalyx palawanensis
intro: Discocalyx palawanensis is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Philippines. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Discocalyx palawanensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infections. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine in the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia.
